titleStmt.title: SII 26.84: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 84. (A.R. No. 81 of 1909.) TIRUVĀṈMIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Tripurasundarī-ammaṉ shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.

This inscription commences with Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc., the praśasti- of the king and records the gift of 5 kāśu for the offering of garland during the pūjā at noon daily of god Mahādēva of Tiruvāṉmiyūr by Kīḻmayānamaṅgala kiḻāṉ ••• ••• •••• yaḍakki Gaṅgādharaṉ of Pūśipākkam alias Śrī-Parāntakanallūr in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-nāḍu in Uṟṟukkāṭṭu-kkōṭṭam. The recipients of the gift money were the members of the Tiruvuṇṇāḻigai-mūlasthāna-sabhā of the temple of Mahādēva at Tiruvāṉmiyūr in Kōṭṭūr-nāḍu in Puliyūrkkōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉiva
ḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum por
ceyappāvaiyuñ cirttaṉiccelvi
yun tanperun=taviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭitiyalū
ḻi Iṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭarvaṉa velippaṭar vaṉavāciyu
ñ cuḷḷicūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟ karumuraṉ ma
ṇṇak kaṭakkamum porutiṭart tiḻattaracartamuṭiyum Āṅkavar tevi
yaroṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cuntara
muṭiyu mintiraṉāramum teṇṭiraiyiḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu yeṟiyaṭaik
keraḷar muṟaimayiṟ cūṭiya kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅka
tirmālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tolperuṅkāval palapaḻantivu
māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa śrīrājendra
coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu puliyūrkkoṭṭattuk koṭṭu
rnāṭṭut tevatāṉam tiruvānmiyūr mahādevar koyil tiruvuṇṇāḻi
kai mulastāna sabhaiyoṅ kaiyeḻuttu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭat
tu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭunāṭṭup pūcipākkamāṉa śrīparāntakanallūr kiḻmayāna
maṅkalaṅkiḻāṉ kaiyaṭakki kaṅkātaraṉ tiruvānmiyūr mahādevaṟku
candrādityavat nicatam niraḻittu muḷpaṭapūt tiruppaḷḷittāmam Ucciya
mpotu cārttiyaruḷuvataṟku vaitta kācu Aiñcu Ikkācu Aiñcum I
t tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sabhaiyoṅ koṇṭu Ittiruppaḷḷitāmam
paṟittaṭṭuvārkku Ikkoyilil paṇṭāranāḻiyāl nicatam nāḻi nellāka
Itiṅkaḷaṟuti nellaṭṭi candrādityavat Ittiruppaḷḷittāmam Ippa
ṭi celuttuvomāṉo muṟcollappaṭṭa tiruvuṇṇāḻikai Uṭai
ya sabhaiyom Idharmam panmāheśvararakṣaiNo. 85 is written in continuation of this..
Digital edition of SII 26.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
